channel.title: React on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in React on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Plakar UI #2: React
item.description: Why React exists and what problems it actually solves — explained to backend developers who know Go and are curious about how modern frontend UIs are built.

item.title: Plakar UI #5: TanStack Query
item.description: How TanStack Query handles all HTTP requests in Plakar UI — automatic caching, deduplication, background refetching, and cache invalidation after mutations.

item.title: Plakar UI #6: TanStack Form
item.description: How TanStack Form and the AppField pattern turn forms from a copy-paste nightmare into composable, declarative building blocks with type-safe validation.

item.title: Plakar UI #8: TanStack Table
item.description: How TanStack Table gives us a headless, fully type-safe data grid — with sorting, filtering, and pagination — without dictating how anything looks.

item.title: Plakar UI #9: TanStack Router
item.description: How TanStack Router brings compile-time safety to client-side routing — broken links, missing params, and wrong search params are all caught before the code ships.
